home.calendarCardSubtitle: Meetings and absences for your enrollments
home.streakNudge: Practice today to keep your {{count}}-day streak going.
home.goalsHint: Set optional session goals and see your daily streak in Settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Game preferences and account
settings.sessionGoalsHelp: Optional targets for Practice mode (time and form-count goals are alternatives—pick one type).
settings.uiLanguageHelp: English or Russian for buttons and menus. Learning content stays the same.
settings.faqUrlBody: When you enroll in a class, practice links use your class and unit so progress lines up with your teacher’s curriculum. Overview and flat routes still work if you are not in a class.
